name: ILNodeSetPDUTimingCyclic
title: ILNodeSetPDUTimingCyclic
syntax: long ILNodeSetPDUTimingCyclic (dbMsg dbMessage, long TrueOrFalse, long offset, long period, long disturbanceCount, long flags)
description: Overrides the defined cyclic-timing from the database. Possibly two timings (False and True) exist in parallel and are selected upon the current transmission mode of the PDU.

parameters.name: dbMessage
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.

parameters.name: TrueOrFalse
parameters.description: 0: denotes the False timing 1: denotes the True timing 3: denotes the True and the False timing

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Defines the delay in [ms] from now when the first cyclic transmission will start.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Defines the period in [ms] for the cyclic transmission.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
